text:
7:52 AM. the system healer wakes up.

scans 651 scripts. all healthy. tests cron. dead for 11 days. writes its own diagnosis. saves it to disk.

the machine watches itself while you sleep. finds what broke. tells you how to fix it.

quiet infrastructure.

78 million people learning how to listen better. how to be present. how to show up for the people who matter.

no app for any of them.

prayer has hallow. meditation has calm. fitness has strava.

relationships have nothing.

the quietest gap is always the biggest.

1,160 posts in a queue. every one written by a system that reads intel, finds patterns, matches voice, formats for platform.

sitting there. patient. waiting for a login.

the work is done. the posting is not.

some days the machine is more ready than you are.
